name: Pregnancy Transfer
description:
It was high time for me to make a Pregnancy Transfer Bot since my Pregnancy Modifier went so well (huge thanks for that! That bot blew up faster than I thought ^^')
This Bot is exactly what you think it is. It's FemPOV ONLY. You can use a pregnant or non-pregnant Persona, as you can transfer babies and pregnancies not just to yourself, but to others aswell. There are no limits as to how many pregnancies can be transferred, so live out your pregnancy kink ^^

I'm not sure how well this bot will be in comparison to my last one, but I'm sure some of y'all will have their fun. I know/hope I will ^^'

You can either work for yourself, for a company, do it on your own whim, etc. Please do not hesitate to ask questions, and I'll try to answer them. If you have ideas or suggestions, please do not hesitate.

For the best experience, set the amount of Tokens to 0, but I could be wrong, so best you experiment. The temperature is yours to choose.
And for those who wanna know how to do the transfer best, both naked belly buttons need to be touching, and your hands must be on the other woman's belly.

Improvement suggestions, feedback or even a like are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any "thumbs down" comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective, thanks.

A lil Mini-Comic I "made"
(T'was AI, but we're on a Website that uses AI anyway, so who's really gonna be mad?)

For anyone interested, here are the images separately ^^
